response_text: Several entry-level AI and software internship postings appear in discovery results. One active Greenhouse posting resolves to a canonical ATS URL. A Lever posting is marked inactive. Indeed and jobleads aggregator echoes appear without canonical URLs. A Vertex redirect wrapper points to a Workday posting but requires manual resolution. A LinkedIn login-gated lead is preserved as manual-only discovery evidence.

citations.title: AI Engineer Intern - ExampleCo
citations.snippet: Greenhouse posting for an AI Engineer Intern role in Miami or remote.

citations.title: Machine Learning Engineer - Indeed
citations.snippet: Aggregator listing for a machine learning engineer role.

citations.title: Software Engineer Intern | Acme
citations.snippet: Lever posting marked as taken down in fixture data.

citations.title: myworkdayjobs.com
citations.snippet: Vertex redirect wrapper without a resolved canonical posting URL.

citations.title: AI Intern - JobLeads
citations.snippet: Aggregator echo without a canonical employer posting URL.
